---
name: Bug Report
about: Report a reproducible bug in the simulator
title: "[Bug] "
labels: bug
assignees: ''
---

## Describe the Bug

A clear and concise description of what the bug is.

## Steps to Reproduce

1. Go to '...'
2. Select element / orbital '...'
3. Press key '...'
4. See error

## Expected Behavior

What you expected to happen.

## Actual Behavior

What actually happened. Include any error messages or visual artifacts.

## Screenshots / Videos

If applicable, add screenshots or a short video to help explain the problem.

## Environment

| Field | Value |
|-------|-------|
| OS | e.g. Ubuntu 22.04 / macOS 14 / Windows 11 |
| GPU | e.g. NVIDIA RTX 3060 |
| OpenGL version | e.g. 4.6 (run `glxinfo | grep "OpenGL version"` on Linux) |
| Simulator version / commit | e.g. v1.2.0 or `abc1234` |
| Build type | Release / Debug |

## Additional Context

Any other information that might help diagnose the issue.
